title: RepositorySnapshot
description: Full observation snapshot for a single GitHub repository, produced by the OBSERVE phase (src/observe.js).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the snapshot was taken

repository.description: Full repository slug in owner/repo format

recently_merged.description: PRs merged within the configured lookback window (prs_merged_days, default 90d)

labels.description: All labels defined on the repository

milestones.description: All milestones (open and closed) on the repository

releases.description: Most recent releases, up to releases_count (default 10)

workflows.description: GitHub Actions workflows defined in the repository

roadmap.description: Contents of the roadmap file, or null if not found

package.description: Parsed package.json dependency info, or null when package.json is absent or malformed

community_profile.description: GitHub community health profile; null when the API is unavailable or returns an error

dependabot_alerts.description: Open Dependabot alert counts by severity; null when vulnerability_alerts:read permission is absent

RepositoryMeta.title: RepositoryMeta
RepositoryMeta.description: Core GitHub repository metadata from GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}

description.description: Repository description text; null when unset

language.description: Primary programming language detected by GitHub; null for non-code repos

open_issues_count.description: Total open issues + PRs as reported by GitHub (includes PRs)

license.description: SPDX license identifier; null when unlicensed

pushed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last push to any branch

Issue.title: Issue
Issue.description: A GitHub issue (PRs are filtered out before storage)

author.description: GitHub login of the issue author; null if the account was deleted

labels.description: Label names attached to the issue

milestone.description: Milestone title; null when no milestone is set

author.description: GitHub login of the issue author; null if the account was deleted

recently_closed.description: Issues closed within the configured lookback window (issues_closed_days, default 90d)

author.description: GitHub login of the PR author

merged_at.description: ISO 8601 merge timestamp; falls back to closed_at when pull_request.merged_at is absent

due_on.description: Due date; null when no due date is set

name.description: Human-readable release name; null when not set

path.description: Path to the workflow YAML file, e.g. .github/workflows/ci.yml

state.description: Workflow state: active, disabled_manually, disabled_inactivity, etc.

path.description: Path to the roadmap file within the repository

content.description: Raw text content of the roadmap file

PackageInfo.title: PackageInfo
PackageInfo.description: Trimmed dependency info extracted from package.json

dependencies.description: Names of production dependencies (keys of dependencies object)

devDependencies.description: Names of dev dependencies (keys of devDependencies object)

CommunityProfile.title: CommunityProfile
CommunityProfile.description: GitHub community health profile from GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/community/profile. Note: the API does not detect YAML-based issue templates; the code falls back to checking .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/ directory.

issue_template.description: True if any issue template exists (either .md format via API or .yml files in .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/)

DependabotAlerts.title: DependabotAlerts
DependabotAlerts.description: Open Dependabot alert counts, grouped by severity

max_severity.description: Highest severity level present; null when there are no open alerts

CIPassRate.title: CIPassRate
CIPassRate.description: Pass-rate metrics computed from the last 100 completed workflow runs

pass_rate.description: Fraction of runs that succeeded (passed / total); null when total_runs is 0

median_days.description: Median days from issue creation to close, rounded to 1 decimal place

sample_size.description: Number of issues used in the calculation

SnapshotSummary.title: SnapshotSummary
SnapshotSummary.description: Derived metrics used for report caching (SHA-256 hash) and LLM prompts

repo.description: Human-readable summary string, e.g. '42 stars, 3 forks'

open_issues.description: Count of currently open issues (PRs excluded)

recently_closed.description: Issues closed within the lookback window

bot_prs.description: Merged PRs authored by bots (dependabot[bot], github-actions[bot], app/...)

unique_contributors.description: Number of distinct PR authors (including bots) in the merged PRs window

releases.description: Count of releases fetched (capped by releases_count config)

latest_release.description: tag_name of the most recent release, or 'none'

top_open_labels.description: Top 5 label names by open-issue frequency, formatted as 'name (count)'

high_reaction_issues.description: Open issues with 2+ reactions, formatted as '#N: title (count)', sorted by reaction count desc

stale_awaiting_feedback.description: awaiting-feedback issues not updated in 14+ days, formatted as '#N: title (Xd)'

community_health.description: community_profile.health_percentage; null when community_profile is null

dependabot_alert_count.description: Total open Dependabot alerts; null when dependabot_alerts is null

dependabot_max_severity.description: Highest Dependabot severity present; null when no alerts or permission absent

ci_pass_rate.description: CI pass fraction; null when no runs exist

bus_factor.description: Minimum number of contributors responsible for 50% of merged PRs; null when fewer than 5 human PRs exist

time_to_close_median.description: Median time-to-close for recently-closed issues; null when no closed issues have both created_at and closed_at
